name: Hall Ticket Print
css: @page { size: A4; margin: 10mm; } body { font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif; color: #333; } .hall-ticket { max-width: 190mm; margin: 0 auto; border: 3px solid #2c3e50; padding: 5mm; position: relative; } .header { text-align: center; border-bottom: 2px solid #2c3e50; padding-bottom: 3mm; margin-bottom: 3mm; } .school-name { font-size: 18pt; font-weight: bold; color: #2c3e50; text-transform: uppercase; } .school-address { font-size: 9pt; color: #666; margin-top: 1mm; } .ticket-title { font-size: 14pt; font-weight: bold; color: #e74c3c; margin-top: 2mm; letter-spacing: 2px; } .student-info { display: flex; gap: 5mm; margin-bottom: 3mm; padding: 3mm; background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 5px; } .photo { width: 30mm; height: 35mm; border: 1px solid #ddd; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #fff; } .photo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .photo-placeholder { font-size: 8pt; color: #999; text-align: center; } .details { flex: 1; font-size: 10pt; } .detail-row { display: flex; margin-bottom: 2px; padding: 1mm 0; border-bottom: 1px dotted #eee; } .detail-label { width: 40mm; font-weight: bold; color: #555; } .detail-value { flex: 1; } .exam-details { margin-top: 3mm; } .exam-details h3 { background: #2c3e50; color: #fff; padding: 2mm 3mm; margin: 0; font-size: 11pt; } .subject-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-bottom: 3mm; } .subject-table th { background: #34495e; color: #fff; padding: 2mm 3mm; text-align: left; font-size: 9pt; } .subject-table td { padding: 2mm 3mm; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; font-size: 9pt; } .subject-table tr:nth-child(even) { background: #f8f9fa; } .instructions { margin-top: 3mm; padding: 3mm; background: #fff3cd; border: 1px solid #ffc107; border-radius: 3px; } .instructions h4 { margin: 0 0 2mm 0; color: #856404; } .instructions ul { margin: 0; padding-left: 5mm; font-size: 9pt; color: #856404; } .signatures { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 5mm; padding-top: 3mm; border-top: 1px solid #ddd; } .signature { text-align: center; } .signature .line { width: 40mm; border-top: 1px solid #333; margin-top: 10mm; padding-top: 2mm; font-size: 9pt; color: #555; }

Important Instructions

  • Bring this hall ticket to the examination hall on all exam days.
  • Report 15 minutes before the scheduled exam time.
  • Electronic devices are strictly prohibited inside the exam hall.
  • Use only blue/black pen for answer sheets.
Class Teacher
